note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. When forbid_overrides is not set and the prompt exists+enabled, the character card's system-prompt replaces `main` and its post-history-instructions replaces `jailbreak` (openai.js:1487-1504). The original content is exposed to macro substitution during replacement. Adapter-verify at Phase-2 wiring. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled.

input.description: forbid_overrides unset; character card system_prompt + post_history_instructions replace the preset's main/jailbreak text.

character.name: Sable
character.description: Character brindle: Sable, a courier who never sleeps.
character.system_prompt: CARD-MAIN: adopt Sable's clipped courier voice.
character.post_history_instructions: CARD-JB: end every reply with a delivery tally.

mustContain: CARD-MAIN: adopt Sable's clipped courier voice.
CARD-JB: end every reply with a delivery tally.

chat.content: CARD-MAIN: adopt Sable's clipped courier voice.
CARD-JB: end every reply with a delivery tally.
